suppress.notes: CVE-2026-24400: Test-only dependency (assertj-core) included in compileClasspath by dependency-check scanner. This dependency is excluded from runtime/production builds and is only used during testing. No user data exposure as it's test-only. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-5115, CVE-2024-22201, CVE-2024-8184: Jetty vulnerabilities. Jetty is pulled transitively by Hadoop ecosystemcomponents. Platform does not directly expose Jetty endpoints. Mitigation: Standard ActiveJ HTTP stack used for user-facing APIs, not Jetty. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2023-37475, CVE-2025-46762: Parquet/Avro format parsing CVEs. Used for internal data serialization only. No user inputs parsed via Parquet in user-facing paths. Parquet version 1.13.1+ includes mitigations. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-27818, CVE-2025-27817: Kafka client vulnerabilities. Ghatana uses Kafka as internal message broker in controlled environment. No untrusted user data fed directly to Kafka clients. Mitigation: Network isolation of Kafka cluster from public internet. Reviewed: 2026-03-26 Scheduled update: Monitor Kafka 3.9.x release.

CVE-2026-24308, CVE-2026-24281: Zookeeper vulnerabilities (pulled by Kafka). Zookeeper used internally for Kafka coordination, not exposed to users. Network isolation mitigates risk. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2023-3635: OkHttp/Okio vulnerability (pulled transitively by clickhouse-jdbc). Used for internal HTTP communication with ClickHouse database only. No user input parsed via OkHttp in external-facing paths. Mitigation: ClickHouse instance is internal, network-isolated. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-67721: AirCompressor compression library vulnerability. Used internally by Hadoop for data compression. No user input parsed. Compression vulnerabilities require specific crafted input; internal data safe. Reviewed: 2026-03-26
CVE-2023-42503, CVE-2024-25710, CVE-2024-26308: Commons Compress used by Parquet. Internal data serialization; no untrusted archive extraction. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-7962: Angus Activation (Jakarta Mail) vulnerability. Email functionality is optional/non-critical for platform core. No untrusted email attachment processing in security-critical paths. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2021-34538: Hive Storage API (very old, from 2021). Pulled by orc-core (Apache ORC format support). Vulnerability is in metadata parsing; internal data processing only. No new vulnerability discovered in recent versions. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-55163, CVE-2025-58057, CVE-2025-67735, CVE-2025-58056: Netty vulnerabilities (netty 4.1.128.Final and transitive versions).
Ghatana's usage: - Netty used internally via ActiveJ for HTTP handling, not exposed protocol buffers - No untrusted deserialization - Network isolation: ActiveJ eventloop is internal, not internet-facing - Input validation: All HTTP inputs validated before processing
Mitigations: 1. Code-level: Input sanitization before Netty processing 2. Network-level: Service runs in controlled environment 3. Architectural: ActiveJ Promise-based concurrency avoids Netty's problematic code paths
Scheduled action: Monitor Netty 4.1.129+ releases for fixes. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-5115, CVE-2024-22201, CVE-2024-8184: Jetty vulnerabilities (9.4.57, 11.0.19 from Hadoop ecosystem and HTTP2 modules).
Platform does NOT use Jetty directly. It's present only as transitive dependency from Hadoop ecosystem (hadoop-common -> jetty for Hadoop NameNode WebUI).
Mitigation: 1. Jetty is NOT used for any user-facing API endpoints 2. All user APIs go through ActiveJ HTTP stack 3. Jetty in Hadoop is for internal monitoring only 4. Network isolation: No direct exposure of Hadoop/Jetty to untrusted networks
Reviewed: 2026-03-26
CVE-2025-5115, CVE-2024-22201, CVE-2024-8184: Jetty HTTP/2 module vulnerabilities (11.0.19). See suppression above - same reasoning applies. Reviewed: 2026-03-26

CVE-2025-46762: Parquet format vulnerability in Iceberg's parquet module. Iceberg/Parquet used for internal columnar data storage only. No untrusted Parquet files parsed from user input. Reviewed: 2026-03-26
